executor_steps: Remove the AGREE annex from ATTITUDE_CALCULATION component type
Add a new AGREE annex to ATTITUDE_CALCULATION.IMPL component implementation
In the new implementation annex, define the required assumptions using only visible identifiers
Ensure the assumptions reference only the component ports available in the implementation scope
